column1: 2am update is in. No changes to intensity. Track is updated every 6 hours so the next advisory will have a new track. It won't change. This track seems relatively LOCKED IN. Intensity is still a question mark for landfall though.  Hopefully Debby just won't have enough time to get tremendously organized and strengthen quickly. Look for a rainy and windy day along the coast with much less wind and rain inland.  Have a great night! 🐢
Denis Phillips unbelievable

Thank you Denis Phillips! You don't panic, I don't panic. That being said, you don't sleep, I don't sleep. Floridian here. I've got a lot of family members who were commercial fisherman as well as sponge divers. Watching the weather/ tides is in my bloodline. Maybe that's why I'm a night owl. 😂
Tallahassee better be prepared for all the downed trees 😪 It's what made me fall in love with this city but it is also the downfall when storms come.
Fingers crossed all our beautiful trees stay put 🤞

For sure a scary city to live in during storms with all the trees. Lighting, wind, saturated ground can bring them down in a second. Tally needs to work towards getting all the power lines buried...easier said than done, I know...
Last year, I went up to Cedar Key to help clean up after the devastation of Idalia. Hoping this is not a repeat.
Thank you Dennis for keeping us updated.
